content:
Claude emerged from **Anthropic**, founded in 2021 by former OpenAI researchers including Dario and Daniela Amodei, with an explicit focus on **AI safety** and **steerable** systems rather than capability alone.

Before the Claude brand was familiar to the public, Anthropic published influential research on **Constitutional AI** and scalable oversight—ideas that shaped how Claude models are trained and aligned. The **Claude** assistant name and consumer chat product followed as Anthropic moved from pure research toward widely usable tools.

This roadmap treats origins lightly here; **About Anthropic → History & Milestones** carries the detailed timeline. **How Claude Works → Constitutional AI (Intro)** explains the training philosophy that distinguishes Claude's development approach.

timeline.description: Anthropic founded with a public-benefit structure and safety-first research agenda.
Constitutional AI and early Claude models released to researchers and developers via API access.

timeline.label: 2023 onward
timeline.description: claude.ai and expanding model tiers (Opus, Sonnet, Haiku) broaden consumer and enterprise adoption.
